title: feat: move generation gateway to gen.pollinations.ai
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Meet gen.pollinations.ai
gist.blurb: We just gave our infrastructure a massive upgrade by splitting the generation gateway into its own dedicated service. Your API calls now have their own fast lane, keeping the dashboard snappy and the hive buzzing smoothly.
gist.summary: The core generation gateway has been extracted into a dedicated gen.pollinations.ai service, separating heavy API traffic from the enter.pollinations.ai dashboard.
gist.impact: Developers will experience more reliable and scalable API performance as generation requests now run on isolated infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a network engineer, setting up a new dedicated server rack for the API. Represents the architectural split and infrastructure upgrade.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, happily plugging colorful cables into a new glowing lime green (#ecf874) server rack. A chunky retro robot companion with a monitor head holds a clipboard with a checklist. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
